title: Recursive Data Structure Generation
scenario: Generate a recursive data structure (e.g. tree, graph) based on a set of input parameters. The data structure should be generated using a specific recursive algorithm.
constraints: Must be a valid JSON object
Must use a specific recursive algorithm (e.g. depth-first search)
Must include at least three recursive elements

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the generated data structure is valid.
Check that the data structure meets the constraints of using the specified recursive algorithm and including at least three recursive elements.
Evaluate the number of recursive elements present in the data structure.
